---
title: "Tarea 1"
subtitle: "Pseudoalineamientos"
author: "Pablo Salazar-Méndez"
date: "2026-04-15"
crossref:
  fig-title: "Figura"
  tbl-title: "Tabla"
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    mainfont: "Arial"
    fontsize: 12pt
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fvextra}
        \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
        \renewcommand{\figurename}{Figura}
---
